title: ActiveCampaign vs Klaviyo (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: ActiveCampaign vs Klaviyo: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool for your needs.
intro: Choosing between ActiveCampaign and Klaviyo comes down to your specific use case. Both are legitimate email marketing platforms, but they serve different audiences. ActiveCampaign is built for businesses needing advanced automation and CRM, while Klaviyo targets e-commerce brands on Shopify or WooCommerce. This comparison covers the key differences so you can decide quickly.

comparison_table.tool_a: Businesses Needing Advanced Automation And Crm
comparison_table.tool_b: E-Commerce Brands On Shopify Or Woocommerce

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on businesses needing advanced automation and CRM
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on e-commerce brands on Shopify or WooCommerce

faq.a: It depends on your use case. ActiveCampaign wins for businesses needing advanced automation and CRM, while Klaviyo is stronger for e-commerce brands on Shopify or WooCommerce. Neither is objectively better — the right choice depends on your specific needs.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, ActiveCampaign or Klaviyo?
faq.a: ActiveCampaign starts at a lower price point ($15/mo vs $45/mo). However, pricing scales with subscriber count, so the total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Klaviyo to ActiveCampaign?
faq.a: Yes, switching from Klaviyo to ActiveCampaign is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export for subscriber lists. Plan for some time to recreate automations and templates, as these rarely transfer directly between platforms.
